decisions.title_en: Anthropic signs SpaceX Colossus 1 deal — all 220k GPUs in Memphis, plus orbital compute MOU, Claude API rate limits +900-1500%
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major novel deal: Anthropic gets 100% of xAI/SpaceX Colossus 1 (220k+ NVIDIA GPUs, 300MW), expressed interest in multi-gigawatt orbital compute partnership; immediately doubles Claude Code 5-hr rate limits, removes peak-hours, lifts Opus API limits 900-1500%. Reads as competitive irony: Anthropic on Musk infra weeks before SpaceX IPO.

decisions.title_en: CAISI signs frontier-AI pre-deployment evaluation agreements with Google DeepMind, Microsoft, xAI
decisions.reason: Previously published 5-4 as 'White House drafts EO requiring federal vetting of new AI models'. New info on 5-5: Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI, in Commerce/NIST) actually SIGNED pre-deployment evaluation agreements with Google DeepMind, Microsoft, and xAI — covering cyber, biosecurity, chemical-weapons risks. CAISI says 40+ evaluations already completed including unreleased systems. This is the operational follow-up to the draft EO.

decisions.title_en: Hut 8 signs $9.8B / 352 MW AI data center lease at Beacon Point, Texas — extensions could push to $25.1B over 15 years
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Crypto-miner-turned-AI-infra Hut 8 signed undisclosed 'high-investment-grade' tenant for 352 MW at Beacon Point, Nueces County TX. Base rent ~$655M/yr, contracted $9.8B over initial term, up to $25.1B with three 5-yr extensions. Stock +36% pre-market. First phase online late 2027. Designed for NVIDIA latest data center systems.

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek raising state-led $45-50B round — China's 'Big Fund' to lead first-ever outside funding
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. China Integrated Circuit Industry Investment Fund ('Big Fund') in advanced talks to lead DeepSeek's first-ever fundraise at ~$45B (some reports $50B); previously valued $10-30B. China's National AI Industry Investment Fund ($8.8B AUM) joining. Beijing formally treating DeepSeek as national AI champion. Renminbi-denominated round.

decisions.title_en: Samsung Electronics joins $1T market cap club on AI memory rally — Q1 operating profit 8x YoY, all from semis
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Samsung +14.4% on 5-6 to cross $1T market cap; second Asian co. after TSMC. Q1 ₩133.9T revenue, ₩57.2T operating profit (8x YoY, record), 94% from semis (₩53.7T). 2026 HBM4 capacity sold out. Samsung+Hynix warn AI memory shortages persist through 2027+. KOSPI hits 7,400. Earlier briefings touched on 'memory pricing' as biggest hyperscaler capex variable; this is the supply-side bookend.

decisions.title_en: Apple in early talks with Intel and Samsung as backup chip foundries — AI supply crunch forces TSMC alternatives
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Bloomberg exclusive 5-5: Apple held early talks with Intel and Samsung about producing main device processors in the US — first secondary option beyond TSMC in years. Driver = AI data center buildout + higher-than-expected Mac AI demand causing chip shortages (Cook flagged 'advanced node availability' as biggest supply chain constraint). No orders yet; Samsung Texas plant visited.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.5 Instant as new ChatGPT default — replaces GPT-5.3 Instant, search-tool memory across past chats / files / Gmail
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct from openai-gpt55-launch-party-musk-invite (which was the 5-5 party event itself). This is the actual model rollout: GPT-5.5 Instant becomes default for all ChatGPT, replacing GPT-5.3 Instant. Adds personalization that searches past conversations + files + Gmail. AIME 2025 81.2 vs 65.4 prior; MMMU-Pro 76 vs 69.2. Lower hallucination in law/medicine/finance. Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise; Pro variant available.

decisions.title_en: Google's secret '24/7' Gemini agent 'Remy' leaks — staff-only build that takes actions across Gmail/Calendar/Docs/Drive
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Business Insider 5-6 exclusive based on internal Google docs: Remy is a staff-only Gemini app variant designed as 24/7 personal agent that 'takes actions on your behalf — not just answers questions'. Deeply integrated with Gmail/Calendar/Docs/Drive/Keep/Tasks; learns user preferences. Likely Google I/O announcement. Frames Gemini's pivot to agentic frontier.

decisions.title_en: Musk v. Altman — Day 7 routine cross of incoming witnesses; no major news vs. Day 6 Brockman testimony
decisions.reason: Already published 4-29, 4-30, 5-4, 5-5 (4 days running). 5-5 entry already covered Brockman's 'Tesla self-driving', '$80B Mars city', and 'Tesla painting' bombshells. 5-6/5-7 testimony of secondary witnesses contains no material development surfacing in major outlets — judge expects liability phase to end ~5-21. Add only when verdict, dismissal, or major bombshell.

Already published 5-5 with full detail on $1.5B JV with Blackstone/H&F/Goldman + 10 finance agents on Opus 4.7 + 64.37% Vals Finance #1. 5-6 / 5-7 coverage is rehashed roundup news (e.g., crescendo.ai aggregator). No new material development.
